---
title: "Tesis"
listing:
    contents: "../posts/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    fields: [date, title, description, categories]
    date-format: "D-MM-YYYY"
    feed: true
    include:
        categories: "Tesis"
page-layout: article
---

Avances en mi tesis de magister.
